title: Grounds for Re-Opening the Establishment. An establishment which
content: 29 has been closed may be re-opened on the following grounds: 30 31 a. That the office is not the subject of the Closure Order; 32 33 b. That the contract of lease with the owner of the building or the building 34 administrator has already been cancelled or terminated. The request to re-open 35 shall be duly supported by an affidavit of undertaking either of the owner of the 36 building or the building administrator that the same will not be leased/rented to 37 any other person/entity for recruitment purposes without the necessary license 38 from the Department; 39 40 c. That the office is shared by a person/entity not involved in illegal recruitment 41 activities, whether directly or indirectly; or 42 43 d. Any other ground that the Department may consider as valid and meritorious. 44 45
